ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or label for the measurement set */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the measurement is an anomaly */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment the sensor is monitoring */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., current, voltage, power factor) */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., Motor, Transformer) */,
  "operational_area" TEXT /* Operational area where the equipment is located (e.g., Production Line 1, HVAC System 1) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_operational_area FOREIGN KEY ("operational_area") REFERENCES operational_areas ("area_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the operational area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operational area */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of the operational area (e.g., production, HVAC) */,
  "area_size" TEXT /* Size of the operational area */,
  "area_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the area */,
  "area_status" TEXT /* Status of the area (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "area_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the area manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_areas_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed (e.g., report name, specific query) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
